calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-03-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Oziel Aranda-Nava Plaintiff/Respondent in Pro Per
Belanio Baysac Defendant/Appellant in Pro Per.
Also in attendance is Carmen Baysac, spouse of Defendant/Appellant

All parties are sworn.

Plaintiff/Respondent Oziel Aranda-Nava testifies on his own behalf.

Defendant/Appellant Belanio Baysac testifies on his own behalf.
Carmen Baysac provides testimony.

The Court asks clarifying questions.

At the close of the hearing, the Court rules as follows:

The Court affirms the Judgment with a modified amount. Belanio Baysac Defendant/Appellant must pay to Oziel Aranda-Nava Plaintiff/Respondent 756.66. Mr. Baysac provides a chack for the total amount in open court.

Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: K. Septien, Not reported, (504).
